name: @stacks/node-publisher-client
description: A client to consume Stacks events from the Stacks Node Publisher service

scripts.build: rimraf ./dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.esm.json && tsc --project tsconfig.build.cjs.json && node -e "require('node:fs').writeFileSync('dist/cjs/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'commonjs' }, null, 2) + '\n')"

author: Stacks Labs
